title: Workhorse Group Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2023 Results
text:
Workhorse Group Q4 & Full Year 2023 Financial Results

Report Date: March 12, 2024

Full Year 2023 Results

Sales: $13.1 million (up from $5.0 million in 2022). Net Loss: $123.9 million (compared to $117.3 million in 2022). Loss from Operations: $105.3 million (compared to $129.1 million in 2022). Cash Position (Dec 31, 2023): $25.8 million in cash and cash equivalents, plus $10.0 million restricted cash.

Q4 2023 Results

Sales: $4.4 million (compared to $3.4 million in Q4 2022). Cost of Sales: $18.1 million (down from $21.2 million). SG&A Expenses: $15.1 million (up from $13.5 million). R&D Expenses: $6.4 million (down from $8.0 million). Net Loss: $45.3 million (compared to $38.7 million in Q4 2022).

Key Developments

CEO Rick Dauch noted that the company is negotiating with financing sources for a transaction that would make liquidity available and implementing cost reductions including a 20% workforce reduction and transitioning the Aero division to a Drones-as-a-Service model.
